narrative:
Paint Township has 2,665 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.7 percentage points.
